summary: iOS | Images in User Guides section (PLACEHOLDER)
scenario: In User Guides under App Settings, only the top 6 devices load correct images while others show placeholders.
description_clean: In the User Guides section under App Settings, only images for the top 6 devices are loaded; all other devices show placeholder images instead of the correct device images.
steps: Go to the User Guides section.
expected: All devices should display their correct device images.
actual: Only the top 6 devices show correct images; all other devices show placeholder images.
